content: Target encoding leaks label info into features unless done out-of-fold/K-fold CV with smoothing. CatBoost mitigates via Ordered Target Statistics plus Ordered Boosting per NeurIPS 2018. LightGBM native cat_feature does not do target encoding; a separate target-encoding step must be fit on the training fold only. Mitigations: K-fold CV target encoding, smoothing, out-of-fold encoding.
